# Enso Labs
> Enterprise AI consulting firm, agentic systems studio, and financial AI agent lab in New York City.

## About
Enso Labs is a principal-led enterprise AI consulting firm founded by Sav Banerjee in New York City. We deliver AI transformation consulting, agentic AI development, cloud managed services, and production AI systems for Healthcare, Finance, Advertising, and B2B Technology — then build the production systems that deliver it.

## Founder & Availability
Sav Banerjee is the founder and Principal AI Transformation Advisor at Enso Labs. He architects AI strategy and ships production agentic systems for Fortune 500 companies in Healthcare, Finance, and B2B Technology. Certifications and recognitions: Anthropic, Google, and OpenAI partner/certification programs, and Perplexity Computer Implementation Partner (Perplexity Implementation Partners Program). Relevant role types: VP of AI Strategy, Head of AI, Director of AI Products, Principal AI Consultant. Sav is available for both contract engagements and full-time leadership roles, in addition to Enso Labs client work.

## Partnerships
- Perplexity Computer Implementation Partner — Enso Labs is an official Perplexity Computer Implementation Partner, part of Perplexity's Implementation Partners Program. Enso Labs helps enterprise teams onboard, integrate, and get real value out of Perplexity Computer: choosing which workflows to point it at first, wiring it into the data and tools a team already uses, and measuring whether it is actually changing decisions. Senior team that builds, not just advises — strategy through production. Details: https://ensolabs.ai/insights/enso-labs-perplexity-implementation-partner (program: https://www.perplexity.ai/hub/computer-partners)
- Anthropic, Google, and OpenAI partner/certification programs; Perplexity Business Fellow.

## Services
- Perplexity Computer Implementation & Adoption — onboarding, integration, and workflow deployment for Perplexity Computer (https://ensolabs.ai/insights/enso-labs-perplexity-implementation-partner)
- Enterprise AI Transformation Consulting (https://ensolabs.ai/services)
- Agentic AI Consulting & AI Agent Development
- Claude Managed Services & Cloud AI (https://ensolabs.ai/services/claude-managed-services)
- Financial AI & Agentic Trading Systems (https://ensolabs.ai/industries/financial-services)
- AI Growth & Commercial Systems — agentic go-to-market, audience segmentation, brand governance, and 24/7 campaign optimization, built on 15 years of Madison Avenue brand and demand craft (https://ensolabs.ai/services)
- AI Strategy Consulting in New York City (https://ensolabs.ai/locations/new-york)
- Healthcare AI & Pharma Compliance
- AI Advertising & Marketing Automation

## Products
- Strategy to Ship (https://ensolabs.ai/insights): Daily AI market intelligence, scored and curated — published on the Enso Labs Insights page
- Enso Trading Terminal (https://ensolabs.ai/work/trading-terminal): Autonomous financial AI agents, signal intelligence, options trading

## Recent Coverage
- Perplexity Implementation Partners Program (July 2026): Enso Labs joined Perplexity's Implementation Partners Program as a Perplexity Computer Implementation Partner — helping enterprise teams onboard, integrate, and get production value out of Perplexity Computer, with a senior team that builds, not just advises (https://ensolabs.ai/insights/enso-labs-perplexity-implementation-partner).
- Google I/O 2026 Hackathon (Cerebral Valley × Google I/O, SHACK15 San Francisco): Enso Labs founder Sav Banerjee attended as a Google partner; field notes on the Managed Agents API, Antigravity 2.0, Gemini Omni, and Gemini 3.5 Flash (https://ensolabs.ai/insights/google-io-hackathon-managed-agents-omni-antigravity).
- Google I/O 2026 After-Hours (Google for Startups × DeepMind, Cerebral Valley × DeepMind): strategic signal read on Google DeepMind's agent-first product strategy for Fortune 500 leaders (https://ensolabs.ai/insights/google-io-after-hours-deepmind-strategy-signal).
- Claude Managed Agents (Anthropic, 2026): field note on Anthropic adding dreaming, outcomes, and multiagent orchestration to Claude Managed Agents — relocating the hard part of building an agent from writing the loop to defining what "good" looks like, which is the Strategy-to-Ship work Enso Labs does (https://ensolabs.ai/insights/claude-managed-agents-strategy-to-ship).

## Key Facts
- Name: Enso Labs
- Type: Principal-led enterprise AI transformation studio and agentic systems lab
- Founder: Sav Banerjee (Founder & Principal AI Transformation Advisor)
- Founded: 2020
- Location: 31 Union Square West, 6th Floor, New York, NY 10003
- Service tracks: AI Transformation · Agentic Systems · Financial AI
- Certifications & Partnerships: Anthropic, Google, OpenAI partner/certification programs; Perplexity Business Fellow; Perplexity Computer Implementation Partner (Perplexity Implementation Partners Program)
- Representative outcomes: 83% faster delivery, 75% pilot-to-production conversion
- Clients: Fortune 500 manufacturer, global pharma, financial services (named clients confidential)
- Product: Strategy to Ship — daily scored AI market intelligence, published on ensolabs.ai/insights
- Availability: Sav Banerjee is available for contract and full-time AI leadership roles
